name: Cybercore Protocol - Mixed Reality
summary: Transform your room into a mixed reality battlefield in Cybercore Protocol. Scan your space, turn walls into corridors, and defend your control hub against enemies breaching through your very walls! Plan each wave with a holographic map, place defense units strategically, and upgrade your weapons, units, and shields. Descend through 45 levels of escalating threats and face powerful bosses that will test your strategy, reflexes, and survival skills.
